name: C-16 legacy mode rejects an id collision when the target scaffold file already exists
command: bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/compliance-add.sh" --url https://x.gov/r --id custom-reg --tree out --jurisdiction 'US' && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/compliance-add.sh" --url https://x.gov/r --id custom-reg --tree out --jurisdiction 'US' 2>err.txt; rc=$?; [ "$rc" -eq 2 ] && grep -q 'collision' err.txt && echo blocked 1>&2
